news.t: COWZ vs CALF vs BUL: Which free cash flow ETF is better to buy?
Pacer's Cash Cows ETF Series Surpasses $10 Billion in AUM

holdings.infoBox: BUL is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 6.61%, Carnival Corporation at 5.01%, Booking Holdings at 4.45%, EMCOR Group at 4.40%, and Uber Technologies at 4.30%.

overview.description: The Pacer US Cash Cows Growth ETF (BUL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer US Cash Cows Growth index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap US growth equities selected using fundamental factors. BUL was launched on May 2, 2019 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer US Cash Cows Growth Index

data.title: COWZ vs CALF vs BUL: Which free cash flow ETF is better to buy?
data.text: Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) by Pacer have become popular among value investors. In addition to their unique names, some of these funds are highly uncorrelated to the broader market.

data.title: Pacer's Cash Cows ETF Series Surpasses $10 Billion in AUM
